description_long: This cowshed is a single-story rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance. The front features a partially open area supported by white columns, with a wooden door and a single rectangular window set into the wall. The interior appears to have a wooden floor and is divided by columns, providing shelter and access for livestock. The rear and side walls are solid, with no visible openings except for the window on the front side. The overall design is functional, with simple lines and materials typical of agricultural outbuildings.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a gray gable roof, open front porch, and a single window and door on the front wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open porch, wooden door, single window, and supporting columns.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid wooden plank wall and the full expanse of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Front-left angle highlighting the window, door, and the open porch area.
description_view_3: Side view of the open porch, showing two doorways and supporting columns under the gable roof.
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular window on the front wall
